summary: literature-retrieve.sh needs 3 upgrades: configurable TOKEN_BUDGET from index.json (BimodalLogic declares 40000 but script ignores it), recursive subdirectory index.json merging, and normalization of chapters[] format (file field) to entries[] shape (path field) before unified scoring.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering TOKEN_BUDGET mismatch analysis, chapters[] vs entries[] schema difference, recursive merge architecture, deduplication strategy, and shell implementation specification
